def negative_serialization_cost_paid_only_to_compare_or_hash_intermediate_state():
    rule_id = "serialization_cost_paid_only_to_compare_or_hash_intermediate_state"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag serialization used only for equality, cache key, or hashing comparisons."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
